title: Håkan Hellström på Ullevi den 7 juni 2014
original_title: Håkan Hellström på Ullevi den 7 juni 2014
overview: On June 7, 2014, Håkan Hellström took the stage in front of a sold-out Ullevi Stadium in Gothenburg. With an audience of 69,349, the hometown concert became the most attended concert in Swedish history. This concert film captures not only the performance itself, but also follows several fans as they prepare for the show on their journey to—and through—Gothenburg.
